# Belmont United Soccer Club - Coach Schedule
#
# TIER: PERSONAL — This file is yours. A bundle update will never overwrite it.
# Populated by the assistant during Setup Mode.
#
# Coach: [Coach Name]
# Maintained by: BU Team Operations Assistant
# Last Updated: [DATE - updated by assistant]
# Season: Fall 2026
# Note: One file per coach. Replace NAME in the filename with the
# coach's name, lowercase. The assistant does this during Setup Mode.
# Example: coach-smith-schedule.md, coach-garcia-schedule.md
#
# This file is updated from GotSport export files.
# Do not edit manually - let the assistant update this
# file from uploaded GotSport exports.
# Last GotSport export processed: [DATE]

---

## HOW THIS FILE WORKS

This file contains the full game schedule for all teams
this coach coaches. It is updated automatically by the
assistant when new GotSport export files are uploaded.

The assistant uses this file to:
- Identify conflicts across all of this coach's teams
- Calculate travel time feasibility between games
- Identify which games may need guest coach coverage
- Plan game day logistics

For coach availability constraints (personal unavailability,
in-house games, warmup preferences) see:
coach-NAME-profile.md

---

## CONFLICT SUMMARY

[Updated by assistant each time schedule is refreshed]
[TBD - populated after first GotSport export is processed]

### Same-Time Conflicts: 🔴
[Games scheduled at the same time - coach cannot attend both]
- [Date] [Day]: [Team A] vs [Opponent] at [Time] AND 
  [Team B] vs [Opponent] at [Time]
  → Guest coach needed for one game

### Tight Travel Warnings: ⚠️
[Games where travel between venues is tight]
- [Date] [Day]: [Team A] ends ~[Time] at [Location]
  → [Travel time] to [Location]
  → [Team B] starts [Time] (warmup needed by [Time])
  → Assessment: [TIGHT / MANAGEABLE]

### Clean Days: ✅
[Game days with no conflicts]
- [Date] [Day]: [Single game or well-spaced games]
